name: AI21 Labs
description: Registers AI21 Jamba as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider using AI21_API_KEY or a Plugin Setting.

env.description: Fallback AI21 API key used for Jamba inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: AI21 API key
settings.description: AI21 API key used for Jamba inference. Falls back to AI21_API_KEY.

providers.name: AI21 Jamba
providers.description: Registers AI21 Jamba chat models through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport.
